---
title: "permutation"
author: "subhash"
date: "2026-04-14"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

#enrichment test

```{bash}
#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH --job-name=perm_v2
#SBATCH --array=1-30
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --ntasks=1
#SBATCH --cpus-per-task=1
#SBATCH --time=3:00:00
#SBATCH --mem=32G
#SBATCH --partition=jclarke,batch,guest
#SBATCH --error=/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/git/GWAS_sorghum_seedling/largedata/permutation_v2/results/logs/perm_%a_err.txt
#SBATCH --output=/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/git/GWAS_sorghum_seedling/largedata/permutation_v2/results/logs/perm_%a_out.txt
#SBATCH --mail-type=ALL
#SBATCH --mail-user=smahamkalivenkatas2@huskers.unl.edu

ml R

Rscript /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/git/GWAS_sorghum_seedling/largedata/permutation_v2/scripts/permutation_test_array_v2.R ${SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID}
```


## /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/git/GWAS_sorghum_seedling/largedata/permutation_v2/scripts/permutation_test_array_v2.R


```{r}
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(data.table))

args <- commandArgs(trailingOnly = TRUE)
TASK_ID <- as.integer(args[1])
cat("Array task ID:", TASK_ID, "\n\n")

# ==============================================================================
# PATHS
# ==============================================================================
repo_root <- "/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/git/GWAS_sorghum_seedling"
outroot   <- file.path(repo_root, "largedata", "permutation_v2", "results")

gwas_path    <- file.path(repo_root, "largedata", "All_GWAS_sorg.txt")
b2_wild_path <- file.path(repo_root, "largedata", "wild_merged_chr.B2.txt")
b2_land_path <- file.path(repo_root, "largedata", "Sorghum_landrace.AGPV5.B2_stat.txt")
b2_imp_path  <- file.path(repo_root, "largedata", "imp_merged_chr.B2.txt")

fst_wl_path  <- file.path(repo_root, "largedata", "figure_2",
                          "sorg_wild_vs_landrace.windowed.weir.fst")
fst_li_path  <- file.path(repo_root, "largedata", "figure_2",
                          "landrace_vs_improved.windowed.weir.fst")

xp_dom_path  <- file.path(repo_root, "largedata", "figure_2",
                          "domestication_landrace_vs_wild.all_chr.tsv")
xp_bre_path  <- file.path(repo_root, "largedata", "figure_2",
                          "breeding_improved_vs_landrace.all_chr.tsv")

dir.create(file.path(outroot, "summaries"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(file.path(outroot, "null_counts"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ==============================================================================
# PARAMETERS
# ==============================================================================
GWAS_THRESHOLD <- 5
TOP_PERCENTILE <- 0.01
B2_MERGE_DIST  <- 10000
B2_BUFFER      <- 5000
N_PERM         <- 10000

set.seed(1000 + TASK_ID)

# ==============================================================================
# TASK MAP
# ==============================================================================
conditions <- c("HN", "LN", "NR")
peak_names <- c(
  "B2_wild", "B2_landrace", "B2_improved", "B2_combined",
  "Fst_WL", "Fst_LI", "Fst_combined",
  "XPCLR_dom", "XPCLR_bre", "XPCLR_combined"
)

stopifnot(TASK_ID >= 1, TASK_ID <= length(conditions) * length(peak_names))

cond_idx <- ((TASK_ID - 1) %/% length(peak_names)) + 1
peak_idx <- ((TASK_ID - 1) %%  length(peak_names)) + 1

MY_COND <- conditions[cond_idx]
MY_PEAK <- peak_names[peak_idx]

cat("Running:", MY_COND, "x", MY_PEAK, "\n\n")

# ==============================================================================
# HELPERS
# ==============================================================================
count_snp_in_peaks <- function(snp_dt, peak_dt) {
  if (nrow(peak_dt) == 0 || nrow(snp_dt) == 0) return(0L)
  hits <- 0L
  for (ch in unique(snp_dt$chr)) {
    snp_pos <- snp_dt[chr == ch, pos]
    pk <- peak_dt[chr == ch]
    if (nrow(pk) == 0 || length(snp_pos) == 0) next
    in_any <- sapply(snp_pos, function(p) any(p >= pk$start & p <= pk$end))
    hits <- hits + sum(in_any)
  }
  hits
}

merge_snps_to_intervals <- function(dt, merge_dist = 10000, buffer = 5000) {
  if (nrow(dt) == 0) return(data.table(chr=integer(), start=integer(), end=integer()))
  setorder(dt, chr, pos)
  dt[, {
    s <- pos[1]
    e <- pos[1]
    starts <- integer()
    ends <- integer()
    if (.N > 1) {
      for (i in 2:.N) {
        if (pos[i] - e <= merge_dist) {
          e <- pos[i]
        } else {
          starts <- c(starts, s)
          ends   <- c(ends, e)
          s <- pos[i]
          e <- pos[i]
        }
      }
    }
    starts <- c(starts, s)
    ends   <- c(ends, e)
    .(start = pmax(1L, starts - buffer), end = ends + buffer)
  }, by = chr]
}

merge_intervals <- function(dt) {
  if (nrow(dt) == 0) return(dt)
  setorder(dt, chr, start, end)
  out <- dt[, {
    cur_s <- start[1]
    cur_e <- end[1]
    starts <- integer()
    ends <- integer()
    if (.N > 1) {
      for (i in 2:.N) {
        if (start[i] <= cur_e + 1L) {
          cur_e <- max(cur_e, end[i])
        } else {
          starts <- c(starts, cur_s)
          ends   <- c(ends, cur_e)
          cur_s  <- start[i]
          cur_e  <- end[i]
        }
      }
    }
    starts <- c(starts, cur_s)
    ends   <- c(ends, cur_e)
    .(start = starts, end = ends)
  }, by = chr]
  out
}

load_b2_positions <- function(path, pop) {
  d <- fread(path)
  if (pop == "landrace") {
    out <- data.table(chr = as.integer(d[[1]]), pos = as.integer(d[[2]]), b2 = as.numeric(d[[4]]))
  } else {
    out <- data.table(chr = as.integer(d[[7]]), pos = as.integer(d[[1]]), b2 = as.numeric(d[[3]]))
  }
  out <- out[is.finite(b2) & b2 > 0]
  thr <- quantile(out$b2, 1 - TOP_PERCENTILE, na.rm = TRUE)
  out[b2 >= thr, .(chr, pos)]
}

load_fst <- function(path) {
  d <- fread(path)
  d[, CHROM := as.integer(CHROM)]
  d <- d[is.finite(WEIGHTED_FST)]
  thr <- quantile(d$WEIGHTED_FST, 1 - TOP_PERCENTILE, na.rm = TRUE)
  out <- d[WEIGHTED_FST >= thr, .(chr = CHROM, start = as.integer(BIN_START), end = as.integer(BIN_END))]
  merge_intervals(out)
}

load_xp <- function(path) {
  d <- fread(path)
  d[, chrom := as.integer(chrom)]
  d <- d[is.finite(xpclr) & xpclr > 0]
  thr <- quantile(d$xpclr, 1 - TOP_PERCENTILE, na.rm = TRUE)
  out <- d[xpclr >= thr, .(chr = chrom, start = as.integer(start), end = as.integer(stop))]
  merge_intervals(out)
}

# ==============================================================================
# LOAD GWAS
# ==============================================================================
cat("Loading GWAS...\n")
gwas <- fread(gwas_path)
setnames(gwas, c("CHROM", "POS", "Pvalue", "Trait", "Condition", "Trait_type"))
gwas[, logp := -log10(Pvalue)]
gwas[, CHROM := as.integer(CHROM)]
gwas[, POS   := as.integer(POS)]

gwas_sig <- gwas[is.finite(logp) & logp > GWAS_THRESHOLD]

sig <- gwas_sig[Condition == MY_COND]
sig_snps <- unique(sig[, .(chr = CHROM, pos = POS)])
n_sig <- nrow(sig_snps)

univ <- unique(gwas[Condition == MY_COND, .(chr = CHROM, pos = POS)])
chr_counts <- sig_snps[, .N, by = chr]
univ_split <- split(univ$pos, univ$chr)

cat("Significant SNPs:", n_sig, "\n")

# ==============================================================================
# BUILD PEAKS
# ==============================================================================
cat("Building peak set...\n")

b2_wild <- merge_snps_to_intervals(load_b2_positions(b2_wild_path, "wild"),      B2_MERGE_DIST, B2_BUFFER)
b2_land <- merge_snps_to_intervals(load_b2_positions(b2_land_path, "landrace"),  B2_MERGE_DIST, B2_BUFFER)
b2_imp  <- merge_snps_to_intervals(load_b2_positions(b2_imp_path,  "improved"),  B2_MERGE_DIST, B2_BUFFER)
b2_comb <- merge_intervals(rbindlist(list(b2_wild, b2_land, b2_imp), use.names = TRUE))

fst_wl  <- load_fst(fst_wl_path)
fst_li  <- load_fst(fst_li_path)
fst_comb <- merge_intervals(rbindlist(list(fst_wl, fst_li), use.names = TRUE))

xp_dom  <- load_xp(xp_dom_path)
xp_bre  <- load_xp(xp_bre_path)
xp_comb <- merge_intervals(rbindlist(list(xp_dom, xp_bre), use.names = TRUE))

pk <- switch(MY_PEAK,
  "B2_wild"       = b2_wild,
  "B2_landrace"   = b2_land,
  "B2_improved"   = b2_imp,
  "B2_combined"   = b2_comb,
  "Fst_WL"        = fst_wl,
  "Fst_LI"        = fst_li,
  "Fst_combined"  = fst_comb,
  "XPCLR_dom"     = xp_dom,
  "XPCLR_bre"     = xp_bre,
  "XPCLR_combined"= xp_comb
)

cat("Peak intervals:", nrow(pk), "\n")
cat("Peak bp:", sum(pk$end - pk$start + 1L), "\n\n")

# ==============================================================================
# OBSERVED + PERMUTATION
# ==============================================================================
obs <- count_snp_in_peaks(sig_snps, pk)
cat("Observed overlap:", obs, "\n")
cat("Running", N_PERM, "permutations...\n")

null_counts <- integer(N_PERM)

for (p in seq_len(N_PERM)) {
  rand_list <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(chr_counts)), function(j) {
    ch <- chr_counts$chr[j]
    n  <- chr_counts$N[j]
    pool <- univ_split[[as.character(ch)]]
    if (is.null(pool) || length(pool) == 0) return(NULL)
    if (n > length(pool)) n <- length(pool)
    data.table(chr = ch, pos = sample(pool, n, replace = FALSE))
  })
  rand_dt <- rbindlist(rand_list)
  null_counts[p] <- count_snp_in_peaks(rand_dt, pk)
  if (p %% 1000 == 0) cat("  done", p, "\n")
}

null_mean <- mean(null_counts)
null_sd   <- sd(null_counts)
fold      <- if (null_mean > 0) obs / null_mean else NA_real_
pval      <- (sum(null_counts >= obs) + 1) / (N_PERM + 1)
zscore    <- if (null_sd > 0) (obs - null_mean) / null_sd else NA_real_

result <- data.table(
  condition       = MY_COND,
  selection       = MY_PEAK,
  n_gwas_sig      = n_sig,
  observed        = obs,
  null_mean       = round(null_mean, 3),
  null_sd         = round(null_sd, 3),
  fold_enrichment = round(fold, 3),
  z_score         = round(zscore, 3),
  perm_pvalue     = pval,
  peak_bp         = sum(pk$end - pk$start + 1L),
  n_peak_intervals = nrow(pk)
)

result[, sig := fifelse(perm_pvalue < 0.001, "***",
                 fifelse(perm_pvalue < 0.01,  "**",
                 fifelse(perm_pvalue < 0.05,  "*", "ns")))]

# ==============================================================================
# SAVE
# ==============================================================================
sum_file  <- file.path(outroot, "summaries",   paste0("perm_", MY_COND, "_", MY_PEAK, "_summary.tsv"))
null_file <- file.path(outroot, "null_counts", paste0("perm_", MY_COND, "_", MY_PEAK, "_null_counts.tsv"))

fwrite(result, sum_file, sep = "\t")
fwrite(data.table(iteration = seq_len(N_PERM), null_count = null_counts), null_file, sep = "\t")

cat("\nSaved summary:", sum_file, "\n")
cat("Saved null counts:", null_file, "\n")
cat("=== Done ===\n")
```


### combine_perm_results_v2.R
```{r}

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(data.table))

repo_root <- "/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/git/GWAS_sorghum_seedling"
resdir <- file.path(repo_root, "largedata", "permutation_v2", "results", "summaries")
outdir <- file.path(repo_root, "largedata", "permutation_v2", "results", "combined")
dir.create(outdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

files <- list.files(resdir, pattern = "_summary\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)
cat("Found", length(files), "summary files\n")

results <- rbindlist(lapply(files, fread), fill = TRUE)

# FDR across all tests
results[, fdr_bh := p.adjust(perm_pvalue, method = "BH")]

results[, sig_fdr := fifelse(fdr_bh < 0.001, "***",
                      fifelse(fdr_bh < 0.01,  "**",
                      fifelse(fdr_bh < 0.05,  "*", "ns")))]

setorder(results, condition, selection)

print(results[, .(
  condition, selection, n_gwas_sig, observed, null_mean,
  fold_enrichment, perm_pvalue, fdr_bh, sig, sig_fdr
)])

fwrite(results, file.path(outdir, "permutation_results_v2_combined.tsv"), sep = "\t")
cat("\nSaved combined results.\n")


```


#### Plotting

```{r}
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(ggplot2)
})

# ==============================================================================
# PATHS
# ==============================================================================
BASE <- "/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/git/GWAS_sorghum_seedling/largedata/permutation_v2/results"
NULL_DIR <- file.path(BASE, "null_counts")
COMBINED_FILE <- file.path(BASE, "combined", "permutation_results_v2_combined.tsv")
OUTDIR <- "/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/git/GWAS_sorghum_seedling/largedata/permutation_v2/plots/histograms"

dir.create(OUTDIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ==============================================================================
# LOAD SUMMARY RESULTS
# ==============================================================================
res <- fread(COMBINED_FILE)
res[, test_id := paste(condition, selection, sep = "_")]

# ==============================================================================
# PLOT ONE HISTOGRAM
# ==============================================================================
plot_one_hist <- function(cond, sel, res_dt, null_dir, outdir) {
  test_id <- paste(cond, sel, sep = "_")
  null_file <- file.path(null_dir, paste0("perm_", test_id, "_null_counts.tsv"))
  
  if (!file.exists(null_file)) {
    message("Missing null file: ", null_file)
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  rr <- res_dt[condition == cond & selection == sel]
  if (nrow(rr) != 1) {
    message("Missing or duplicated summary row for: ", test_id)
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  null_dt <- fread(null_file)
  
  obs <- rr$observed
  null_mean <- rr$null_mean
  pval <- rr$perm_pvalue
  fdr <- rr$fdr_bh
  fold <- rr$fold_enrichment
  
  p <- ggplot(null_dt, aes(x = null_count)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 40, fill = "grey75", color = "black") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = null_mean, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.9) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = obs, color = "red", linewidth = 1.1) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(cond, " × ", sel),
      subtitle = paste0(
        "Observed = ", obs,
        " | Null mean = ", round(null_mean, 2),
        " | Fold = ", round(fold, 3),
        " | P = ", format(pval, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3),
        " | FDR = ", format(fdr, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
      ),
      x = "Permutation overlap count",
      y = "Frequency"
    )
  
  outfile <- file.path(outdir, paste0("Hist_", test_id, ".pdf"))
  ggsave(outfile, p, width = 5.8, height = 4.3, dpi = 300)
  message("Saved: ", outfile)
  
  invisible(p)
}

# ==============================================================================
# MAKE ALL HISTOGRAMS
# ==============================================================================
for (i in seq_len(nrow(res))) {
  plot_one_hist(
    cond = res$condition[i],
    sel  = res$selection[i],
    res_dt = res,
    null_dir = NULL_DIR,
    outdir = OUTDIR
  )
}

cat("All histograms saved to:\n", OUTDIR, "\n")
```


###### plotting _ dot plot
```{r}
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(ggplot2)
})

BASE <- "/mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/git/GWAS_sorghum_seedling/largedata/permutation_v2"
INFILE <- file.path(BASE, "results", "combined", "permutation_results_v2_combined.tsv")
OUTDIR <- file.path(BASE, "plots", "panelB")
dir.create(OUTDIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

d <- fread(INFILE)

keep_levels <- c(
  "B2_wild",
  "B2_landrace",
  "B2_improved",
  "Fst_WL",
  "Fst_LI",
  "XPCLR_dom",
  "XPCLR_bre"
)

d <- d[selection %in% keep_levels]

label_map <- c(
  B2_wild     = "B2 wild",
  B2_landrace = "B2 landrace",
  B2_improved = "B2 improved",
  Fst_WL      = "FST wild vs landrace",
  Fst_LI      = "FST landrace vs improved",
  XPCLR_dom   = "XP-CLR domestication",
  XPCLR_bre   = "XP-CLR breeding"
)

d[, selection_label := label_map[selection]]

row_order <- c(
  "B2 wild",
  "B2 landrace",
  "B2 improved",
  "FST wild vs landrace",
  "FST landrace vs improved",
  "XP-CLR domestication",
  "XP-CLR breeding"
)

d[, selection_label := factor(selection_label, levels = rev(row_order))]
d[, condition := factor(condition, levels = c("HN", "LN", "NR"))]

d[, direction := fifelse(fold_enrichment >= 1, "Enriched", "Depleted")]
d[, sig_plot := fifelse(fdr_bh < 0.001, "***",
                 fifelse(fdr_bh < 0.01,  "**",
                 fifelse(fdr_bh < 0.05,  "*", "")))]

# safer for plotting size
d[, logFDR := -log10(pmax(fdr_bh, 1e-300))]
d[, plot_size := pmax(logFDR, 0.3)]

p <- ggplot(d, aes(x = fold_enrichment, y = selection_label)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.5, color = "grey40") +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 1, xend = fold_enrichment,
                   y = selection_label, yend = selection_label),
               linewidth = 0.5, color = "grey75") +
  geom_point(aes(size = plot_size, fill = direction),
             shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = 0.4) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sig_plot), nudge_x = 0.10, size = 4) +
  facet_wrap(~ condition, nrow = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Enriched" = "#D95F02", "Depleted" = "#BDBDBD")) +
  scale_size_continuous(
    name = expression(-log[10](FDR)),
    range = c(2.8, 8)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Fold enrichment of GWAS hits in selection peaks",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey92", color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
  )

ggsave(file.path(OUTDIR, "Fig4_panelB_dotplot_7rows.pdf"), p, width = 11, height = 5.2)
ggsave(file.path(OUTDIR, "Fig4_panelB_dotplot_7rows.png"), p, width = 11, height = 5.2, dpi = 400)

cat("Saved:\n")
cat(file.path(OUTDIR, "Fig4_panelB_dotplot_7rows.pdf"), "\n")
cat(file.path(OUTDIR, "Fig4_panelB_dotplot_7rows.png"), "\n")

```
